login.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your admin account
login.hint: Use this account to access the monitoring system
login.setupNotice: First run detected. Please set up an admin account.

error.network: Cannot reach the server. Check that the backend is running.

login.forgotPasswordDesc: In a self-hosted environment, you can recover your account using the methods below.
login.recoveryMethod1Title: Method 1: Temporary Access via Env Vars, then Re-initialize (Recommended)
login.recoveryMethod1Desc: Create a temporary account via env vars, log in, then go to Settings → Account Reset to set up a fresh account.
login.recoveryMethod1Step2: Log in with the credentials above
login.recoveryMethod1Step3: Settings → Account Reset → create a new account
login.recoveryMethod2Title: Method 2: Delete Account Data and Re-initialize
login.recoveryMethod2Desc: Remove the data volume and restart to return to the initial setup screen. Monitoring data is preserved.
